name: hll-bots
description: Bot para CRCON/HLL com ranking top kills e anuncio automatico

scripts.start: SERVICE_NAME="${SERVICE_NAME:-hll-top-bot}"; sudo systemctl start "$SERVICE_NAME" && sudo systemctl status "$SERVICE_NAME" --no-pager
scripts.restart: SERVICE_NAME="${SERVICE_NAME:-hll-top-bot}"; sudo systemctl restart "$SERVICE_NAME" && sudo systemctl status "$SERVICE_NAME" --no-pager
scripts.refresh: SERVICE_NAME="${SERVICE_NAME:-hll-top-bot}"; git pull --ff-only && sudo systemctl restart "$SERVICE_NAME" && sudo systemctl status "$SERVICE_NAME" --no-pager
scripts.stop: SERVICE_NAME="${SERVICE_NAME:-hll-top-bot}"; sudo systemctl stop "$SERVICE_NAME" && sudo systemctl status "$SERVICE_NAME" --no-pager || true
